screenTypes.description: Default power-on screen with Pioneer DJ branding, no track loaded
Main playback screen with enlarged and overall waveforms, track info, BPM, tempo, time, hot cue markers, loop markers, beat countdown, and phase meter
screenTypes.trigger: Track is loaded and selected from browse screen

subModes.description: Beat loop selector overlay at bottom (1/4 through 32 beat values)
subModes.trigger: Touch BEAT LOOP tab on waveform screen

subModes.description: Key shift bar with -/+ semitone controls and current/target key display
subModes.trigger: Touch KEY SHIFT tab on waveform screen

subModes.description: Beat jump selector overlay at bottom (1/2 through 4 beat values with direction arrows)
subModes.trigger: Touch BEAT JUMP tab on waveform screen

screenTypes.description: Track list browser with category sidebar (TRACK, ARTIST, ALBUM, BPM, KEY, HISTORY), column headers, preview waveforms, and track metadata columns
screenTypes.trigger: Press BROWSE, TAG LIST, PLAYLIST, or SEARCH button

screenTypes.description: Source/device selection screen listing connected USB, SD, and LINK devices with device info panel and MY SETTINGS LOAD button
Search screen with on-screen QWERTY keyboard, search input field, and filtered track results list
screenTypes.trigger: Press SEARCH button while browsing rekordbox library

screenTypes.description: Track filter editing screen with BPM/KEY tab (BPM stepper, key selector, rating stars, color filter) and MY TAG tab (category columns with selectable tags)
screenTypes.trigger: Press and hold TRACK FILTER/EDIT button

screenTypes.description: System settings screen with category sidebar (DJ SETTING, DISPLAY, PRO DJ LINK, SYSTEM, INFO), settings list with current values, and option radio buttons
Quick settings screen with 4-quadrant layout: player settings (waveform/phase, hot cue, brightness, quantize, beat jump), device info, waveform color/position settings, and MY SETTINGS load/save
Detailed track metadata display with album artwork, title, artist, album, genre, duration, BPM, key, rating, date, bitrate, and comment fields
screenTypes.trigger: Touch INFO on browse screen or (i) icon on waveform screen

atomComponents.description: Bottom status bar showing player number, time display, tempo, BPM, sync/master status, master tempo indicator, and musical key
SVG waveform renderer supporting overall (full track) and enlarged (zoomed) variants with playhead, hot cue markers, loop regions, beat grid, and cue points
Track information bar with device icon, track title, duration, BPM, and key
Top-right touch tabs for BEAT LOOP / KEY SHIFT / BEAT JUMP on the waveform screen
Horizontal phase offset meter showing beat/bar deviation from sync master
Touchable row of beat value buttons for loop or jump selection with half/double controls
Key shift control bar with -/+ buttons, current key display, shift amount, and reset button
Left sidebar for browse screen showing category icons (TRACK, ARTIST, ALBUM, etc.) with active highlight
Single track row with index number, play indicator, preview waveform, title, artist, BPM, and key columns
Circular on-jog display with artwork, track info, SLIP/VINYL/SYNC/MASTER indicators, and rotating playhead
